Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Enforcer technique]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — An Enforcer technique can cause a person to drift slowly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon can execute a basic Enforcer technique.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — An Enforcer technique protects and powers a user's body with madra until the madra is depleted or the technique is dropped.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — The binding is meant to test an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — The Flowing Sword is an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Jai Daishou uses an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — The young Blackflame used his Enforcer technique to dodge.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius uses an Enforcer technique to flow madra through his body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — An Enforcer technique can be used to block out pain.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — Enforcer technique is a basic technique that can be boosted by the egg's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon uses the Enforcer technique to restrain Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — An Enforcer technique provides a full-body strengthening effect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Ekerinatoth activates an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Ekeri uses an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — The Enforcer technique can provide speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — An Enforcer technique is a technique used by Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Enforcer techniques can be full-body or single strikes like palm-strikes or sword slashes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's master's blade pulses with the power of her Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon was shrouded in the burning black-and-red of his Enforcer technique.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — An Enforcer technique can emit pink light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The Enforcer technique can provide explosive strength and speed.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Enforcer attack techniques are a standard option for combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon activates a pure madra Enforcer technique that manifests as blue-white flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Pride uses a defensive Enforcer technique with a gray haze.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Sophara uses an Enforcer technique to fuel her jump.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Enforcer technique has limits.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Blacksword's soul was in poor shape after his match.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith uses an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin's Enforcer technique is considered fine but not worth working on by the Winter Sage.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Pride used four Enforcer techniques to break Mercy's grip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — The Titan uses an Enforcer technique that manifests as a golden nimbus.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — An Enforcer technique was used on Reigan Shen's axe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Jai Long's Enforcer technique is imbalanced due to inconsistently baptized channels.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon's partner used an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — A spirit Enforcer technique is needed to separate drained madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Red Faith uses an Enforcer technique to knit his bones and flesh back together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Dreadgod combined a Forged claw of Blackflame madra with an Enforcer technique.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Northstrider funnels the Enforcer technique into his fists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Enforcer technique prepares the soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ziel used no Enforcer technique while fighting his Remnant.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Shadeseeker's limbs were covered by an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian uses an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Bloody Thorn may have used an Enforcer technique during her fight.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
